# About Information Detail

This document outlines the standard "About Us" and legal information page.

## 1. Page Layout
- **Structure**: Vertical `Column` with centered content.
- **Components**:
  - App Logo/Branding.
  - Version Number (e.g., `V4.0.0`).
  - Company/Product Information.
  - Software Licenses and Legal Disclaimers.

## 2. UI Generation Rules
- **Aesthetics**: Use `theme.textSecondary` for long-form legal text to reduce visual weight.
- **Navigation**: Simple `AppBar` with a back button.

---
> [!NOTE]
> This page serves as the official record of the application's versioning and ownership.
